languages.text: Вооруженные солдаты едва не расстреливают вышедшую им навстречу пропавшую экспедицию. Они также докладывают, что внутри этих туннелей есть останки лагеря, по всей видимости, принадлежащего имперской экспедиции.

The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.
languages.original_text: Вооруженные солдаты едва не расстреливают вышедшую им навстречу пропавшую экспедицию. Они также докладывают, что внутри этих туннелей есть останки лагеря, по всей видимости, принадлежащего имперской экспедиции.

traits.locale_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

languages.text: 武装した兵士たちは、彼らに会いに現れた行方不明の隊員たちを銃で撃とうとする。また、これらのトンネル内には、帝国の探検隊のものと思われるキャンプの遺構があることを報告する。
languages.original_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperium expedition.

traits.locale_text: 武装した兵士たちは、彼らに会いに現れた行方不明の隊員たちを銃で撃とうとする。また、これらのトンネル内には、帝国の探検隊のものと思われるキャンプの遺構があることを報告する。

languages.text: Los soldados armados casi disparan a los miembros del equipo desaparecido que salieron a su encuentro. También informan de que en los túneles están los restos de un campamento de una expedición Imperial.
languages.original_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Los soldados armados casi disparan a los miembros del equipo desaparecido que salieron a su encuentro. También informan de que en los túneles están los restos de un campamento de una expedición Imperial.

languages.text: 武装士兵险些向迎面走来的失踪队员开火。据他们汇报，在隧道深处发现了一处营地遗迹，显然属于某支帝国考察队。
languages.original_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: 武装士兵险些向迎面走来的失踪队员开火。据他们汇报，在隧道深处发现了一处营地遗迹，显然属于某支帝国考察队。

languages.text: Die bewaffneten Soldaten feuern beinahe auf die verschwundenen Teammitglieder, als sie diese endlich entdecken. Sie berichten, dass es in diesen Gängen die Überreste eines Lagers gibt, das offenbar von einer imperialen Expedition errichtet wurde.
languages.original_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Die bewaffneten Soldaten feuern beinahe auf die verschwundenen Teammitglieder, als sie diese endlich entdecken. Sie berichten, dass es in diesen Gängen die Überreste eines Lagers gibt, das offenbar von einer imperialen Expedition errichtet wurde.

languages.text: Silahlı askerler, onları karşılamaya çıkan kayıp ekip üyelerini neredeyse vuruyor. Ayrıca bu tünellerin içinde görünüşe göre bir İmparatorluk keşif heyetine ait bir kampın kalıntıları olduğunu rapor ediyorlar.
languages.original_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Silahlı askerler, onları karşılamaya çıkan kayıp ekip üyelerini neredeyse vuruyor. Ayrıca bu tünellerin içinde görünüşe göre bir İmparatorluk keşif heyetine ait bir kampın kalıntıları olduğunu rapor ediyorlar.

languages.text: Les soldats armés manquent d'abattre les membres de l'expédition disparue qui viennent à leur rencontre. Ils rapportent également avoir trouvé les vestiges d'un campement, appartenant vraisemblablement à une expédition impériale.
languages.original_text: The armed soldiers nearly shoot the missing team members who come out to meet them. They also report that inside these tunnels are the remains of a camp, apparently belonging to an Imperial expedition.

traits.locale_text: Les soldats armés manquent d'abattre les membres de l'expédition disparue qui viennent à leur rencontre. Ils rapportent également avoir trouvé les vestiges d'un campement, appartenant vraisemblablement à une expédition impériale.
